allow: Bash(gofmt -w cmd/server/main.go internal/config/config.go internal/ws/handler.go internal/protocol/event.go internal/adapter/adapter.go internal/adapter/generic_parser.go internal/adapter/generic_parser_test.go internal/runner/runner.go internal/session/session.go internal/store/store.go)

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "$connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not $connections\) { exit 0 }; $pids = $connections | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($pid in $pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Stop-Process -Id 34256 -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500')
